name: claude-thread-core
title: Claude Working Thread Core
description: High — poured from the pass-100 live-app-verified claude-desktop shell (cowork working thread); data-scale="working|cinematic" (cinematic ported from claude-chat-pane 48px serif treatment), light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens. Reusable Claude transcript/tool-use pane for videos that need the active thread without sidebar, composer, task rail, or outer app window. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.
